'''Tro'Har''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Coyn system/Legends|Coyn system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Covered in [[Methane/Legends|methane]] ice, it boasted a navigation beacon to assist inbound traffic. The name "Tro'Har" meant "Farthest Blade" in the [[Coynite language]].

{{Planet-stub}}
